pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: Goblin scouts, wolves, and a perimeter line. Someone taught this patch of forest manners. Violent ones.

pre_mission.speaker: Aric
pre_mission.line: Then we break the line before they warn the next nest.

pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: That was almost witty. I should mark the date.

pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: I am focused. I am also judging your mood.

battle_start.speaker: Lyria
battle_start.line: Stars above, try to keep up.

post_mission.speaker: Villager
post_mission.line: They did not raid for food. They watched the road. They wanted us moving.

post_mission.speaker: Aric
post_mission.line: A screen operation. Not random violence.

post_mission.speaker: Lyria
post_mission.line: That would explain why I hate this already.

post_mission.speaker: Aric
post_mission.line: We keep moving before they reset the trap.
